metadata.description: Draft HCI and visualization research papers from scattered notes and a RefHub vault

plugins.name: refhub-paper-drafter
plugins.description: Draft HCI and visualization research papers from scattered notes and a RefHub vault. Grounded, structured, and modeled on best-paper-award exemplars — with interactive scaffolding, source-map grounding, writing quality review, and an adversarial R2 reviewer loop.
